questions: Are US-Iran contacts still active right now?
Is there any confirmed settlement or ceasefire already agreed?
What do public vessel and social signals imply about near-term force posture?

claims.claim_text: US and Iran are still in active indirect contacts today.
A finalized settlement or ceasefire has already been agreed.
Public tracking suggests a US amphibious posture shift, but it still does not confirm intent.
A US amphibious group could reach a relevant public watch position within roughly one to two days.

candidates.text_excerpt: Oman said indirect contacts are continuing and described the latest exchanges as constructive.

Iran denied that any finalized deal had been reached.
Public AIS points to a US amphibious group moving toward the eastern Mediterranean watch area.

report_markdown:
# News Index Report: Hormuz negotiation realistic offline fixture

One-line judgment (2026-03-23T10:00:00+00:00, confidence 32-80, gate usable): 1 core claim(s) have fresh support; current read is evidence-backed but still watch the conflict panel.

## Confirmed
- US and Iran are still in active indirect contacts today.

## Not Confirmed
- A finalized settlement or ceasefire has already been agreed. (denied)
- A US amphibious group could reach a relevant public watch position within roughly one to two days. (unclear)
- Public tracking suggests a US amphibious posture shift, but it still does not confirm intent. (unclear)

## Inference Only
- None

## Latest Signals First

| Source | Tier | Channel | Age | Rank | Note |
|---|---:|---|---|---:|---|
| Oman Foreign Ministry | 0 | core | 6m | 155 | Oman said indirect contacts are continuing and described the latest exchanges as constructive. |
| Iran Foreign Ministry | 0 | core | 11m | 125 | Iran denied that any finalized deal had been reached. |
| Axios | 1 | background | 1m | 120 |  |
| MarineTraffic | 2 | shadow | 4m | 115 | Public AIS points to a US amphibious group moving toward the eastern Mediterranean watch area. |
| Reuters | 1 | core | 13m | 100 | A senior official said indirect contacts continued but there was no finalized settlement. |
| SentDefender | 3 | shadow | 2m | 90 | A high-engagement thread claims a large CONUS-to-Middle-East airlift and faster-than-expected positioning. |
| AP | 1 | background | 1.2d | 80 | Earlier reporting noted indirect channels but without fresh same-day confirmation. |
| Al-Monitor | 2 | shadow | 20m | 55 | Regional reporting says a deal may be close, but cites no direct confirmation and no signed settlement. |
